# shopify Provider

Manage Shopify store resources via the GraphQL Admin API.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) Shopify Admin API access token. Can also be set via SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable.
- `api_version` (String) Shopify API version (e.g. 2025-04). Defaults to 2025-04.
- `store_url` (String) Shopify store URL (e.g. your-store.myshopify.com). Can also be set via SHOPIFY_STORE_URL environment variable.
